channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.22 (Build 20260528)
item.description:
What's New

fix(settings): live section switch (no recreate)

Replace the @State-driven section in SettingsView/PreferencesView with a

shared ObservableObject navigator owned by the window controller. The

controller exposes reveal(section:) / reveal(tabIndex:) which mutates

the navigator, deminiaturizes the window if needed, then brings it

forward - no close+recreate flicker, no lost viewModel state, no stale

'selectedSection' field that ignores the user's internal navigation.

Stacks on top of #281 which routed Cmd+, through openPreferences().

  • SettingsView/PreferencesView: @State -> @ObservedObject navigator
  • Window controllers hold the navigator and expose reveal(...)
  • AppDelegate.openSettings/openLegacyPreferences: bring-front instead

of close+recreate when the window already exists

  • Bump CURRENTPROJECTVERSION to 20260528

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
